title: Breaking Europe’s Trans-Atlantic Habit: The End of the Senior Partner Myth
description: When U.S. President Donald Trump floated the possibility of taking Greenland by force, European leaders reacted with outrage — and then, almost immediately, with relief once he backed down. title: Atomically Thin Materials Significantly Shrink Qubits
description: Quantum computing is a devilishly complex technology, with many technical hurdles impacting its development.
